document_api_meta.title: Upload File Init
document_api_meta.env_desc:
To upload a large file to Tiktok Shop (e.g., a video), follow these three steps:
1. Initialize the upload session for the video.
2. Upload the video file to the TTS server. Files smaller than 5 MB must be uploaded as a single, non‑chunked request.
3. Call the API corresponding to the target path and pass the ResourceId returned in step 2 as a parameter.

For more detailed content, refer to the document:https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/wfi3nz36

request_header_param.name: x-tts-access-token
request_header_param.desc:
Depends on the auth type of the API. 
1. The seller access_token value from [Get Access Token](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a3292b0f40314a92d75#Get%20Access%20Token%20API), when user_type = 0. Follow this [guide](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a344ddec3030b238fa0) to get seller access_token.
2. The creator access_token value from [Get Access Token](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a3292b0f40314a92d75#Get%20Access%20Token%20API), when user_type = 1. Follow this [guide](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a362dccb8030ea6f98c) to get creator access_token.
3. The partner access_token value from [Get Access Token](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a3292b0f40314a92d75#Get%20Access%20Token%20API), when user_type = 3. Follow this [guide](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a3978f4c20311b8b555) to get partner access_token.

request_query_param.name: shop_cipher
request_query_param.desc:
Use this property to pass shop information in requesting the API. Failure in passing the correct value when requesting the API for cross-border shops will return incorrect response. 
Get by API [Get Authorization Shop](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/6507ead7b99d5302be949ba9?external_id=6507ead7b99d5302be949ba9)

request_query_param.name: category_asset_cipher
request_query_param.desc:
Use this property to pass shop information in requesting the API. Failure in passing the correct value when requesting the API for cross-border shops will return The partner identifier used in API requests. 
Retrieve this value by using the [Get Authorized Category Assets API](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/666012dd609d4402cc3be995).

request_query_param.name: app_key
request_query_param.desc: Every single app will have a unique key. Please use the specific key assigned to your app.

request_query_param.name: sign
request_query_param.desc: Signature generated by gen algorithm. When you send API requests to TTS, you must sign them so that TTS can identify the senders.

request_query_param.name: timestamp
request_query_param.desc: Unix timestamp GMT (UTC+00:00). This timestamp is used across all API requests. Developers can use this convert to local time.

request_body_param.name: file_type
request_body_param.desc: Supported file types. current only support video

request_body_param.name: target_path
request_body_param.desc: After the video is uploaded, use this interface to bind the video resource to the specific material

response_param.name: code
response_param.desc: The success or failure status code returned in API response.

response_param.name: message
response_param.desc: The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message.

response_param.name: ^upload_url
response_param.desc: The URL provided by platform where the file can be uploaded.

response_param.name: ^upload_token
response_param.desc: An identifier to upload a file

scope_list.package_description: The Partner will be able to receive and reply to Instant Messages from buyers.
scope_list.auth_info: The Partner will be able to receive and reply to Instant Messages from buyers.

scope_list.package_description: You will be able to post shoppable content to the creator's TikTok account. If this content violates any TikTok Shop terms or policies, TikTok Shop may take enforcement action against the creator's account or the content.
scope_list.auth_info: The developer will be able to post shoppable content to your TikTok account. If this content violates any TikTok Shop terms or policies, TikTok Shop may take enforcement action against your account or the content.
